reviews.comment:
Siempre es la parada ideal para comer algo al regreso de la Costa.  El sándwich multicereal de vegetales es la mejor opción para los que no consumimos carne. Las cajeras son muy atentas con los clientes. Siempre hay fila para abonar.

(Translated by Google)
It's always the perfect place to stop for a bite on the way back from the coast. The multigrain vegetable sandwich is the best option for vegetarians. The cashiers are very attentive to customers. There's always a line to pay.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNva09YcjlnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cargamos nafta, picamos y seguimos, super bueno el trato, con algunas opciones más para celíacos para comer sería ideal

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with gas, had a snack, and continued on. The service was great; adding a few more gluten-free food options would be ideal.
